notes: US-based professional association for corporate directors. Publishes the Director's Handbook on Cyber-Risk Oversight (jointly with ISA Internet Security Alliance) — the dominant board-level cyber-oversight reference. Paid.

match_nodes.description: NACD Director's Handbook on Cyber-Risk Oversight

data.official_name: NACD Director's Handbook on Cyber-Risk Oversight
data.notes: Paid. Co-published with Internet Security Alliance (ISAlliance). The board-level cyber-oversight reference for US-listed companies.
